zh.lifeSummary: 當Hadwig Billung von Sachsen於1043年出生在德國薩辛時，她的父親Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen48歲，母親Eilika von Schweinfurt58歲。她和Engelbert I. von Spanheim至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1112年6月1日享年69歲，埋葬在德國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hadwig Billung von Sachsen于1043年出生在德国薩辛时，她的父亲Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen48岁，母亲Eilika von Schweinfurt58岁。她和Engelbert I. von Spanheim至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1112年6月1日享年69岁，埋葬在德国。

nameMeanings.name: Billung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Billing, derived from Old English bil ‘sword’, or a habitational name from Great and Little Billing in Northamptonshire, meaning ‘(settlement of) the followers (Old English -ingas) of a man called Bill(a) or Bȳdel’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, formed with a cognate of Old Saxon bīl ‘sword’.
Danish and Norwegian: from an Old Danish personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Billings
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Billing , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belling
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Belling, in Pomerania, Baden, Hesse, Thuringia, and elsewhere.

English (Devon): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Belling, Beling, of uncertain origin (perhaps from Old English Bǣdling, an original nickname from bǣdling ‘effeminate man’). Alternatively, a variant of Billing .

variants.name: Billinger
meanings: German: from the personal name   Billing   2.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer, Armin, Claus, Heinz, Hildegarde, Johannes, Kurt, Wolfgang.

variants.name: Sachs
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Lower Saxony (German Niedersachsen) in northern Germany. The region is named for the ancient Germanic tribe that settled there in Roman times, whose name derives from an ancient Germanic word (preserved in Old Saxon and Old High German), sahs ‘knife, sword’. The area in central Germany called Sachsen was named after the line of princes who owned title to the northern territories in 1422.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): surname adopted in memory of persecuted forebears, an acronym of the Hebrew phrase Zera Qodesh SHemo ‘his name is of the seed of holiness’. Compare Socks and Zacks .

nameMeanings.name: Hadwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hadwig Billung von Sachsen was born in 1043, in Saxony, Germany, her father, Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen, was 48 and her mother, Eilika von Schweinfurt, was 58. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Engelbert I. von Spanheim. She died on 1 June 1112, at the age of 69, and was buried in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hadwig Billung von Sachsen est née en 1043, à Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Eilika von Schweinfurt, avait 58 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Engelbert I. von Spanheim. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1112, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hadwig Billung von Sachsen 1043 in Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen 48 und ihre Mutter Eilika von Schweinfurt 58. Sie hatte mit Engelbert I. von Spanheim mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1112 im Alter von 69 Jahren und wurde in Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hadwig Billung von Sachsen è nata il nel 1043 nel Sachsen, Germania, sua padre, Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Eilika von Schweinfurt, aveva 58 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Engelbert I. von Spanheim. Morì il 1 giugno 1112, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Hadwig Billung von Sachsenが1043年にドイツサチセンで生まれた時，父Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsenは48歳，母Eilika von Schweinfurtは58歳であった。彼女はEngelbert I. von Spanheimとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1112年6月1日に69歳で死去し，ドイツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hadwig Billung von Sachsen(이)가 1043년 독일 작센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eilika von Schweinfurt(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 Engelbert I. von Spanheim(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1112년 6월 1일 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hadwig Billung von Sachsen nasceu em 1043, em Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tinha 58 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Engelbert I. von Spanheim. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1112, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hadwig Billung von Sachsen родилась в 1043 г. в местности сачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Eilika von Schweinfurt, 58. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Engelbert I. von Spanheim. Она умерла 1 июня 1112 г. в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hadwig Billung von Sachsen nació en 1043, en Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Bernhard II. Billung Herzog von Sachsen, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tenía 58 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Engelbert I. von Spanheim. Murió el 1 de junio de 1112, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Alemania.
